blocks.text: Bodo/Glimt conquer San Siro in Norwegian football's greatest European night

A dramatic CL night: Atalanta crushed Dortmund 4-1, Real Madrid edged Benfica, PSG shared spoils with Monaco. But Bodø/Glimt's 2-1 victory at San Siro is the result Norway will be talking about all week.
🎿 Thu 16:05 — Biathlon Women's 15km Individual, Kontiolahti — Tandrevold, Røiseland & Kirkeeide
